name: Customer
description: A party that buys goods or services from the company.

name: Supplier
description: A party that provides goods or services to the company.

name: BusinessUnit
description: An organizational unit that recognizes revenue and owns customer relationships.

name: Invoice
description: A billing document issued to a customer with a due date and settlement status.

name: RevenueEntry
description: A recognized revenue amount for a business unit in a period.

name: ComplianceFinding
description: An open or closed compliance issue raised against a customer.

name: SupplyRelationship
description: A supplier-to-supplier supply link in the multi-tier supply network.
